title: Backend Developer
description: About the Team At Trendyol Tech, our mission is to create a positive impact in our ecosystem by enabling commerce through technology. We solve complex problems with data, creativity, and agility — always driven by real outcomes. With a culture built on learning, collaboration, and ownership, we grow together while building what’s next. About the Role As a Backend Developer at Trendyol, you will play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining the core systems that power our products and services. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, high-performance solutions that millions of users rely on every day. Leveraging modern technologies and best practices, you will help shape our backend architecture, ensure seamless integration with other services, and continuously improve our platforms to meet the evolving needs of our customers. Expected Qualifications Team Player: Humble, lifelong learner with a customer-first mindset. Practical Knowledge: Proficient in OOP, Design Patterns, Clean Code, Software Craftsmanship culture, Refactoring, Unit, and Integration Testing. Experience: 2+ years of experience in at least one of the following languages: Java, Go, C#, Scala, Kotlin, Node.js. Database Management: Experience with relational/non-relational Database Management Systems such as PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Couchbase, etc. Messaging Patterns: Experience with messaging patterns like saga, outbox, and message brokers such as Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc. CI/CD Experience: Proficient in Continuous Delivery and Continuous Integration, familiar with infrastructure as code tools such as Terraform. Backend Services: Experience in building backend services using mainstream frameworks. Agile Mindset: Agile-minded team player with strong communication skills. Distributed Systems: Preferably experienced in fault-tolerant and loosely coupled distributed architectures. Containerized Experience: Experience with Kubernetes, observability, monitoring, and resource optimization is a significant plus. Language Skills: Good command of written and spoken English. What We Offer - Hybrid working model with flexibility: a schedule that helps you find the right balance between flexibility and team bonding, including work-from-abroad opportunities and a summer working model. - Customisable FlexBenefits budget: Adjust your daily meal allowance, choose your health insurance package (and extend it to your spouse or children), and pick from additional benefits like fuel support or Trendyol shopping credits. - Well-being support: Access to location-based in-house doctors, as well as psychologist and dietitian support, and HPV vaccination provision. - Personalised training allowance and learning opportunities: Use your annual budget for any training or conference of your choice, explore our Learning Management System (LMS) anytime, and join in-person learning sessions offered throughout the year. - Responsibility from day one: Take full ownership from the start in a culture where every voice is heard and valued. - A diverse, international team: Collaborate with global peers across our offices in Berlin, Amsterdam, Dubai, and beyond, in a startup-spirited and collaborative environment. - Opportunities to grow with the best: Tackle meaningful challenges, develop through hands-on experience, and grow with the support of expert guidance and global mentoring. - Meaningful connections beyond tasks: Be part of team rituals, events, and social activities that help us stay connected and inspired. Take the Next Step If this role excites you, apply today, we look forward to taking the next step with you. Want to get to know the team better first? Explore our Career Website, LinkedIn, or YouTube to learn more about #LifeatTrendyol and how we work.

title: Senior PHP Developer
description: About Us ideasoft is a technology company that will increase the competitiveness of companies of all sizes in the process of realizing their business goals, create added value, and produce quality, advanced projects and solutions. ideasoft has been growing rapidly since 2005 and offers web-based software, design and desktop software solutions to more than +45000 businesses in the field of E-Commerce We are looking for a skilled, motivated Software Developer to work in our office located in Dudullu-Ümraniye Büdotek. If you're a passionate software professional, a self-starter, a good problem solver and have a history of success in challenging and fast-paced environments, you could be the ideal candidate for this position. Required Skills, Knowledge and Experience BS degree in Software/Computer Engineering or significant relevant experience. Proven track record of a minimum 5 years experience of software development, including senior experience 3+ years experience in one or more modern PHP frameworks (Symfony, Laravel, Phalcon etc.) Experience with scalable and distributed SaaS systems Solid understanding of OOP concepts and software design patterns. Strong PHP programming expertise. Experience with multi-threading and memory management. Solid RDBMS knowledge like MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, etc. Experience NoSQL databases like MongoDB, Redis, CouchBase etc. Experience with message queues like Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc. Experience working in an agile development environment. Experience version control systems like Git etc. Comfort with UNIX/Linux environments. An analytical mind to grasp concepts and solve problems quickly. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. No military obligation for male candidates. Nice To Have Strong knowledge of architectural patterns like Modular Monolith, Microservice, SOA, Event-driven and CQRS Experience in Payment Systems Experience with Jira / Confluence project management tools Responsibilities Participate in the design and development phase of software production Perform code reviews to drive teams to the highest standards for backend development Preparing the relevant unit tests for the test scenarios of the applications To participate and contribute to technical and architectural discussions Mentoring junior developers What We Offer? The E-senlik Wellbeing Program we have prepared for employees Birthday leave Women's Day leave to women employees Full Health Benefits Meal Allowance Transportation allowance Unlimited snacks in the office

title: Backend Software Engineer (Python, Django)
description: As TechNarts, our aim is to hire experienced Backend Developers (Open to new graduates and candidates with up to 4 years of experience) who are proactive and who have high potential and interest in a high-paced environment. You will have a chance to work with your senior as well as learn from them. You will use cutting-edge technologies to build the best product. The responsibility is managing services that’s development ended or getting small upgrades as well as making them excellent. We invite you to join TechNarts’ fast-paced environment and engineering culture. Our tech stack: Python, Django, Go, Apache Kafka, Redis You will work on multiple different projects on telecommunication sector. What will you be doing? • After project delivery, you will take ownership of the project, resolve any issues that arise, continuously improve the solution, and provide ongoing support to ensure service excellence and optimal performance. • Developing enterprise web applications (mainly on backend) • Product development • Research and development • Design and improve backend services to enhance the performance and scalability of our system architecture • Possess solid experience with relational databases, particularly PostgreSQL • Build and fine-tune microservice architecture with smooth asynchronous communication using tools like Kafka and RabbitMQ • Strengthen system reliability through effective use of caching technologies, especially Redis • Tackle technical and functional challenges with a strong analytical approach • Take ownership in deploying new releases seamlessly and supporting continuous delivery processes • Contribute to cross-team innovation by bringing forward new technologies and creative solutions • Be comfortable working with distributed version control systems such as Git and platforms like GitHub What do we offer? • Relaxed work hours • Yearly training budget • Employees are encouraged to get Master’s or PhD degree • Personal and professional development to grow internally within our organization • We encourage and support our employees to do sports for their physical and mental development About TechNarts TechNarts is a leading company which differs from others with its strategy, working model, resource utilization and its approach to customer relations by adding the system and needs analysis phases to the project management. This way, the major focus is on consulting the companies lacking knowledge in information technology. Besides, the system efficiency is controlled by determining the business needs of customers not just by software development but also by fully analyzing and controlling change management processes. All the technological advances are followed by project based professional staff on behalf of the customers and feasible cost-effective solutions that are compatible with the business needs and requirements of the customers are offered. You don’t need to meet all the requirements to apply. If you are motivated, willing to learn, and interested in backend development, we strongly encourage you to apply. Please include GitHub, GitLab, or any project/work samples if available.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: !!!!!!! SADECE SAKARYA'DA İKAMET EDENLER BAŞVURSUN LÜTFEN İş Tanımı Şirketimizde, web ve kurumsal uygulamalar geliştirmek üzere Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Adayın hem frontend (React, Next.js) hem de backend (Java + Spring Boot) teknolojilerinde deneyimli olması beklenmektedir. Ekibimize katılacak kişinin, modern teknolojilere açık, problem çözme yeteneği yüksek ve ekip çalışmasına yatkın olması önemlidir. Sorumluluklar -Web ve kurumsal uygulamaların geliştirilmesi, güncellenmesi ve bakımı -Frontend tarafında React ve Next.js ile kullanıcı arayüzlerinin geliştirilmesi -Backend tarafında Java, Spring Boot ve MySQL kullanarak API ve veritabanı geliştirme -Kodun optimize edilmesi ve uygulama performansının artırılması -Proje sürecinde teknik problemlere çözüm üretmek Gereksinimler -React, Next.js, Java ve Spring Boot teknolojilerinde en az 1 yıl deneyim -MySQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanlarıyla çalışma tecrübesi -Versiyon kontrol sistemleri (Git vb.) konusunda bilgi -Yeni teknolojilere açık, ekip çalışmasına yatkın ve çözüm odaklı yaklaşım İlgilenen adayların özgeçmişlerini turkey@unitutor.de adresine veya +902645024656 WhatsApp hattına göndermelerini rica ederiz.

title: Senior Node.js Backend Developer
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Node.js Backend Developer in Turkey. Join a high-performing engineering environment focused on building secure, scalable, and real-time backend systems that support global digital finance services. This role is ideal for an experienced developer who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, designing reliable infrastructure, and shipping impactful products used by customers worldwide. You will work in a remote-first, fast-moving culture where autonomy, ownership, and innovation are highly valued. The position offers the opportunity to contribute to mission-critical services, APIs, and next-generation financial products. You’ll collaborate with talented engineers across multiple regions while continuously learning new technologies. If you thrive in backend architecture, distributed systems, and performance optimization, this is an exciting opportunity to make a measurable impact. Accountabilities Design, build, and maintain backend services using Node.js and JavaScript for high-traffic, mission-critical applications. Develop new products, features, and platform enhancements using agile delivery methodologies. Optimize system scalability, responsiveness, and reliability to support continuous user growth. Build and maintain robust APIs with strong performance, low latency, and high availability. Integrate external systems such as blockchain networks, payment layers, and third-party services. Implement secure development practices across services, processes, and infrastructure. Collaborate closely with product, engineering, and operations teams to deliver seamless solutions. Monitor production systems, troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve platform stability. Requirements Strong professional experience with Node.js, JavaScript, and backend software development. Proven experience contributing to complex platforms or distributed systems at scale. Solid understanding of microservices architecture and event-driven systems. Hands-on experience with relational and NoSQL databases such as MySQL and MongoDB. Knowledge of caching layers, message queues, and background job processing tools such as Redis. Strong understanding of security best practices, secure APIs, and data protection principles. Ability to quickly learn new technologies and adapt in a fast-changing environment. Experience with blockchain integrations is highly valued. Familiarity with Ruby, Rust, or C++ is a plus. Excellent communication skills and ability to work independently in a remote setting. Benefits Competitive salary package. Fully remote and flexible work environment. Opportunity to work with an international and highly skilled team. Career growth and advancement opportunities. Mentorship from experienced professionals. Continuous learning and knowledge-sharing culture. Team-building events and social activities, both virtual and in-person. High-impact work where your contributions directly shape products and services. Supportive, collaborative, and innovation-driven culture. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: At HubX we build mobile apps, used and loved by millions all around the world. We have a track record of building and growing mobile apps on various verticals that reached over 300 million users across 6 continents and 170+ countries. We are looking for a talented "Senior Backend Developer” to join our energetic and highly motivated team. As a talented "Senior Backend Developer” you have plenty of opportunities at your fingertips. So, why should HubX be your next move? We offer you an opportunity to make a huge impact in the lives of millions of users through our products, and even the mobile app industry at large in the next years to come. X Culture: Do What You Love At HubX, we pride ourselves on fostering an environment of collaboration, creativity, and innovation. Our #XCulture is more than just a workplace ethos; it's a lifestyle. We believe passion drives success. At HubX, Do What You Love isn’t just a motto; it's the foundation of our work. Some of your responsibilities Develop Backend Applications: Work on creating backend applications and enhance the quality of our system architecture. Refine Integrations Between Applications: Improve and fine-tune the integrations to ensure seamless interaction between different applications. Analyze and Resolve Technical Issues: Identify, analyze, and fix technical and application-related problems. Deploy New Releases: Manage the deployment of new software releases to ensure smooth updates. Act as a key technical reference within the backend team in our Istanbul office, providing technical expertise, supporting team coordination, and ensuring alignment with best practices. What we look for Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or a related field. Minimum of 5 year of experience delivering production-ready backend code in an Agile team environment. Minimum 3 years of backend development experience in the Node.js ecosystem Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and integration Proficiency with databases such as MongoDB and/or PostgreSQL Strong grasp of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles Experience working with messaging queue systems (e.g., Pub/Sub, RabbitMQ, Kafka) Nice to Have Experience with microservice architectures and event-driven systems Hands-on project experience with GCP, AWS, or other cloud platforms Familiarity with whitelabel system structures and chatbot technologies Experience working with .NET / C# The perks and benefits of working with us We would like you to focus on what you do best, we take care of the rest. Huge impact: Your work can significantly impact our millions of users, and even the mobile app industry at large in the next years to come. Ownership, opportunity to take responsibility from day one: No one will micromanage you. Together with your team, you’ll be free to choose a direction, test, fail, and test the next idea. A competitive compensation package: A competitive compensation package: Our total compensation package is very comprehensive; covering your cost of commuting for our headquarters as well as providing you with a meal card. A brand new Macbook and welcome kit Private Medical Insurance & HPV Vaccine & Critical Women’s Health Coverage: We go above and beyond for your health. Gym Reimbursement: We support annual gym membership because we want you to be in tip-top shape psychically and mentally. A unique and top-notch office: Our Istanbul office is located at Maslak, right in the heart of the city. Surrounded by the energy of Istanbul’s bustling core, it’s a space designed for creativity and collaboration. Unlimited coffee from XPresso: You can grab a cup of coffee whenever you need, whether it’s to kickstart your morning or power through the day. Limitless Snacks & breakfast: Fuel your day with our fully stocked kitchen! From a hearty breakfast to a variety of snacks available anytime, we’ve got everything you need to stay energized and focused. Continuous education: The more you want to improve your knowledge, the more we support you! Meditopia membership: Enjoy full access to Meditopia for mental wellbeing, yoga, and therapy. Cambly access: Break language barriers with weekly Cambly speaking sessions. Team events that create lasting memories, including our traditional All Hands gatherings where the whole company comes together, as well as more humble celebrations and happy hours. Curious about our vibe? Take a look at our Instagram! Strong company culture: Our approach is always open communication & teamwork. #XCulture X Community discounts: Being part of HubX comes with perks, enjoy exclusive discounts and more as a valued member of our community. The Recruiting Process At HubX , we value transparency and efficiency. Here’s a glimpse into our streamlined recruitment process: Application Submission: Apply by submitting your CV, LinkedIn profile, or a brief introduction about yourself. Talent & Culture Interview: Engage in a conversation with our People & Culture team to discuss your background, aspirations, and how we align with each other’s goals. Case Study Assignment: Showcase your skills through a practical task related to the role. Technical Interview: Meet with your potential team lead for an in-depth review of your case study and technical expertise. Welcome Aboard!: If all goes well, we’re excited to extend an offer and welcome you to the team. Your personal data collected through your job applications will be processed by HubX in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK") for the recruitment and evaluation. To review our data protection informing text: Link İş başvurularınız kapsamında toplanan kişisel verileriniz HubX tarafından işe alım ve değerlendirme amacıyla 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu'na ("KVKK") uygun olarak işlenecektir. Aydınlatma metnimizi incelemek için: Link
